title: bauhinia funchiana
intro: Bauhinia funchiana, also known as the orange hill orchid tree or Bauhinia, is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its vibrant orange flowers and broad, flat leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bauhinia funchiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even support kidney function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal formulations to harness its medicinal properties.
